text.font-family: JetBrains Mono, Fira Code, Cascadia Code, monospace

svg.text: Demo 4: "Chrome in a Pod — Wayland + GPU"

text.tspan: # [0:00] Narration: "A browser agent needs GPU, display, and audio. Here's how envpod does it without

# Highlight: 3 browser presets — browser, browser-use, playwright.
# Highlight: gpu: true, display: true, audio: true, display_protocol: wayland, audio_protocol:
# [0:30] Launch Chrome inside the pod with display and audio forwarding:
sudo envpod run browser -d -a -- google-chrome --no-sandbox --ozone-platform=wayland htt
# [0:00] Narration: "A browser agent needs GPU, display, and audio. Here's how envpod does it without
# Highlight: 3 browser presets — browser, browser-use, playwright.
# Highlight: gpu: true, display: true, audio: true, display_protocol: wayland, audio_protocol:
# [0:30] Launch Chrome inside the pod with display and audio forwarding:
sudo envpod run browser -d -a -- google-chrome --no-sandbox --ozone-platform=wayland https://y
# [0:00] Narration: "A browser agent needs GPU, display, and audio. Here's how envpod does it without
# Highlight: 3 browser presets — browser, browser-use, playwright.
# Highlight: gpu: true, display: true, audio: true, display_protocol: wayland, audio_protocol:
# [0:30] Launch Chrome inside the pod with display and audio forwarding:
sudo envpod run browser -d -a -- google-chrome --no-sandbox --ozone-platform=wayland https://youtub
# [0:00] Narration: "A browser agent needs GPU, display, and audio. Here's how envpod does it without
# Highlight: 3 browser presets — browser, browser-use, playwright.
# Highlight: gpu: true, display: true, audio: true, display_protocol: wayland, audio_protocol:
# [0:30] Launch Chrome inside the pod with display and audio forwarding:
sudo envpod run browser -d -a -- google-chrome --no-sandbox --ozone-platform=wayland https://youtube.com
# [0:00] Narration: "A browser agent needs GPU, display, and audio. Here's how envpod does it without
# Highlight: 3 browser presets — browser, browser-use, playwright.
# Highlight: gpu: true, display: true, audio: true, display_protocol: wayland, audio_protocol:
# [0:30] Launch Chrome inside the pod with display and audio forwarding:

# Highlight: 3 browser presets — browser, browser-use, playwright.
# Highlight: gpu: true, display: true, audio: true, display_protocol: wayland, audio_protocol:
# [0:30] Launch Chrome inside the pod with display and audio forwarding:
# Chrome window appears on the desktop. Navigate YouTube. Play a video — audio works.
# [0:00] Narration: "A browser agent needs GPU, display, and audio. Here's how envpod does it without
